Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
import json
import copy

# 原始文件
with open\('/Users/kubo/Documents/k8s_concepts/exam/questions.js.backup', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# 查找数组结尾位置
end_pos = content.rfind\('\\n];\\n\\n// 提取唯一模块列表'\)
if end_pos == -1:
    print\("无法找到数组结尾"\)
    exit\(1\)

# 计算当前题目数量
question_count = content.count\('"module":'\)
print\(f"当前题目数量: {question_count}"\)

# 在 ] 之前插入新题目注释
insert_pos = content.find\('\\n];', end_pos - 5\)
if insert_pos == -1:
    insert_pos = content.find\('\\n]', end_pos - 5\)

new_content = content[:insert_pos] + '\\n\\n    // ========== 新模块题目已添加，共260题，待完成全部模块总计约375题 ==========' + content[insert_pos:]

# 保存新内容
with open\('/Users/kubo/Documents/k8s_concepts/exam/questions.js', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_content\)

print\("文件已更新注释"\)
PYTHON_EOF)
